scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity187-189. Restricted to route and corridor aliases only. Current data/identity-overrides/merges.json already includes the identity189 route/corridor additions, so this artifact uses the current override state as baseline and does not re-propose already-merged aliases.
scope.write_limit: Only this review note was written. No merges.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical JSONL, canonical DB, materialized outputs, wiki files, or provider-backed commands were intentionally used or edited.

candidate_limit.requested: up to 6 very high-confidence route/corridor aliases if possible
candidate_limit.note: No new route or corridor alias cleared the guard checks after identity187-189 without either duplicating an earlier prep artifact or crossing a route-variant, bundled-route, corridor-extent, branch/direction, or borough/scope guard.

validate_repo_duplicate_global_identity.method: Read-only validateRepo() via bun --eval over current canonical JSONL plus current identity overrides.
route_or_corridor_messages_sample: Global corridor records corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-sbs-candidate and corridor_church-av share identity key corridor_church-ave.
Global corridor records corridor_cross-bay-blvd-2015 and corridor_cross-bay-blvd-sbs-spring2015 share identity key corridor_cross-bay-blvd.
Global corridor records corridor_flatlands-ave-brooklyn-b82 and corridor_flatlands-avenue-brooklyn-oct2018 share identity key corridor_flatlands-ave.
Global route records route_bx55-2012 and route_bx55-lga-2012 share identity key route_bx55.
Global route records route_m14-ad-sbs and route_m14-brt-phase2 share identity key route_m14.

not_repeated.reason: Still absent from current merges.json, but already prepared as a prior Codex alias; not re-proposed in this next batch.
Still absent from current merges.json, but already prepared as a prior Codex alias; not re-proposed in this next batch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_125th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 and corridor_125th-st-manhattan share identity key corridor_125th-st-crosstown-corridor.
source_or_payload_evidence: corridor_125th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 payload: BRT Phase II candidate corridor.
corridor_125th-st-manhattan payload limits: Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue.
deferred.reason: Deferred for corridor extent mismatch risk. The Phase II crosstown candidate is broad, while the existing target has concrete Morningside-to-Second limits.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: records share corridor_14th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 and corridor_14th-st-crosstown-corridor identity keys.
source_or_payload_evidence: corridor_14th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 payload: BRT Phase II candidate corridor.
corridor_14th-street-ttp payload limits: 3rd Avenue to 8th Avenue westbound and 9th Avenue to 3rd Avenue eastbound.
deferred.reason: Deferred exactly as in identity189: broad 14th Street crosstown candidate versus specific TTP/busway operational limits.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-local and corridor_church-av share corridor_church-av.
validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-sbs-candidate and corridor_church-av share corridor_church-ave.
source_or_payload_evidence: bus_forward_2#p005_c0001 lists 'G Church Avenue' as a future SBS candidate corridor without limits.
bus_forward_2#p011_c0002 lists Church Av from Coney Island Av to Flatbush Av as a local bus priority corridor.
corridor_church-av payload limits and source quotes identify Flatbush Ave to Ocean Pkwy, 0.9 miles.
deferred.reason: Deferred because the same source distinguishes a Coney Island-to-Flatbush local segment, while the richer Church Av target is Flatbush-to-Ocean Pkwy. The unlabeled SBS candidate cannot be safely collapsed into the target without stronger extent evidence.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: corridor_cross-bay-blvd-2015 collides with Liberty/109 Av, SBS Spring 2015, Rockaway-to-165, and Woodhaven/Cross Bay records on corridor_cross-bay-blvd.
source_or_payload_evidence: corridor_cross-bay-blvd-2015 limits: north of 165 Av.
corridor_cross-bay-blvd-liberty-109av-2015 limits: at Liberty Avenue and 109 Avenue.
corridor_cross-bay-boulevard-rockaway-to-165 limits: Rockaway Boulevard to 165 Avenue.
corridor_cross-bay-blvd-sbs-spring2015 includes broader Cross Bay bus-lane / Q52-Q53 corridor context.
deferred.reason: Deferred for corridor extent and whole-corridor versus subsegment mismatch. Cross Bay Boulevard appears in multiple Q52/Q53 contexts, but these records do not all describe the same limits.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: B82 Southern Brooklyn collides with multiple Kings Highway records on corridor_kings-highway.
validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: corridor_flatlands-ave-brooklyn-b82 and corridor_flatlands-avenue-brooklyn-oct2018 share corridor_flatlands-ave.
source_or_payload_evidence: corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn limits: Cropsey Avenue/Bay 37 Street to Canarsie area; street: Kings Hwy and Flatlands Ave.
corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-kings-highway limits: Bay Pkwy to Ocean Ave and E 23 St to Ave K.
corridor_kings-hwy-brooklyn-b82-cb11 limits: Bay Pkwy to McDonald Ave in CB 11.
corridor_flatlands-ave-brooklyn-b82 limits: E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave.
corridor_flatlands-avenue-brooklyn-oct2018 limits: Ave I to Ralph Ave.
deferred.reason: Deferred because the shared street names occur inside larger B82 corridor records and distinct subsegments. Flatlands Oct2018 is wider/different from the already-collapsed E 103-to-Pennsylvania Flatlands segment.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_bay-parkway-cropsey and corridor_cropsey-ave-brooklyn-b82 share identity key corridor_cropsey-ave.
source_or_payload_evidence: corridor_bay-parkway-cropsey limits: Bay Parkway from Avenue J to Shore Parkway; Cropsey Avenue from Bay Parkway to 26th Avenue.
corridor_cropsey-ave-brooklyn-b82 description: B82 corridor segment from Bay 37 St northward.
deferred.reason: Deferred because the target is a two-street Bay Parkway/Cropsey study area while the alias candidate is a Cropsey-only B82 corridor segment.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports shared street identity keys for Lexington Avenue, Third Avenue, and Woodhaven Boulevard records.
source_or_payload_evidence: Third Avenue records have adjacent but distinct limits: 36th to 55th and 55th to 57th.
Woodhaven records have distinct limits: Dry Harbor Road to Metropolitan Avenue, Union Turnpike to 81st Road, and Queens Boulevard to 107th Avenue.
Lexington records were already deferred in identity189 for distinct segment/intersection contexts.
deferred.reason: Deferred for segment-boundary mismatch. Shared street labels alone are not enough for corridor aliasing.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-amityville-babylon and corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-babylon-sayville share identity key corridor_montauk-branch.
source_or_payload_evidence: One record limits are Amityville to Babylon.
The other record limits are Babylon to Sayville.
deferred.reason: Deferred for branch segment mismatch. Same rail branch, different bounded work segments.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports multiple Utica Avenue corridor key collisions including corridor_utica-ave, corridor_utica-ave-corridor, and corridor_utica-ave-brt-phase2.
source_or_payload_evidence: identity189 already deferred the Utica group for broad-corridor versus narrower Carroll/St. Johns-to-Church segment risk.
deferred.reason: Deferred for broad BRT/B46 corridor versus narrower bus-priority segment mismatch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports shared base route keys for B103, B82, Bx41, and B46 records.
source_or_payload_evidence: The colliding records explicitly include limited, local, express, local/limited bundle, and SBS variants.
deferred.reason: Deferred for route-variant guard. Shared base route number is not enough to merge local, limited, express, SBS, or bundled local/limited records.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_bx40-bx42-tremont-cb5-2024 and route_bx42-tremont-cab1 share identity key route_bx42.
source_or_payload_evidence: route_bx40-bx42-tremont-cb5-2024 is a Bx40/42 bundled route record.
route_bx42-tremont-cab1 is a single Bx42 route record.
deferred.reason: Deferred for route-bundle guard: do not collapse Bx40/Bx42 bundle into single Bx42.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports Bx55, Q53, Q44, and Q52/Q53 route key collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: 2012_04_20_brt_lga_workshop_summary#p003_c0006 lists participant-identified access ideas including 'Bx41/Bx55 from northern Bronx to LGA via Robert F. Kennedy Bridge' and 'Q53 from Rockaway Park to LGA'.
route_bx55-2012 target is the Webster Avenue Bx55 Limited cluster.
route_q53-sbs-ace target is the implemented Q53 SBS on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard.
identity189 already deferred Q44 SBS versus pre-SBS Q44 and Q52/Q53 bundle versus single Q52 SBS.
deferred.reason: Deferred for context and variant mismatch. LaGuardia workshop route ideas are too thin to merge into Webster/Woodhaven implemented-service clusters, and Q44/Q52 collisions remain SBS/pre-SBS or bundle/single-route traps.

blockers: No new route/corridor alias cleared all guards after identity187-189. Remaining validator collisions are dominated by service-variant traps, route bundles, corridor extent/subsegment mismatches, or broad street-name collisions.

Two plausible route aliases, route_m14-brt-phase2 -> route_m14-ad-sbs and route_b44-brt-phase2 -> route_b44-sbs, were already prepared in earlier Codex artifacts and are therefore not duplicated here.

Several corridor aliases that look tempting by street name fail on explicit limits: Church Avenue, Cross Bay Boulevard, Flatlands/Kings Highway, Woodhaven Boulevard, Third Avenue, Lexington Avenue, Utica Avenue, and Montauk Branch segments.
